title: Short walking breaks may help office workers focus
description: A workplace study found that short walking breaks helped workers feel more alert. Participants walked for five minutes every hour. Researchers said larger studies are still needed.
text: A workplace study found that short walking breaks helped workers feel more alert. Participants walked for five minutes every hour. Researchers said larger studies are still needed.
thai_text: งานวิจัยในที่ทำงานพบว่าการเดินพักสั้น ๆ อาจช่วยให้พนักงานตื่นตัวและมีสมาธิมากขึ้น
